description: Native candle inference as the ONLY serving path (llama.cpp sidecar retired after per-family parity gates; GGUF stays export-only). Model-generic via an ArchAdapter layer-enumeration seam (branch-from-any-base invariant: trainable => servable or refused at preflight). Arbitrary interleaved gpu_shards placement, in-process adapter hot-reload at keep-commit, per-arch seam_points() as the structural/instrumentation fundamental. Granite Mamba2 ops implemented in-runtime (Phase B) rather than falling back.
